title: Berean Standard Bible
description: A modern, highly accurate English translation.

title: King James Version (PCE)
description: The Pure Cambridge Edition of the historic King James text.

title: American Standard Version
description: The 1901 ASV, known for its strict, literal translation methodology.

title: Bible in Basic English
description: A highly accessible translation utilizing a strict 1,000-word vocabulary limit.

title: Geneva Bible (1599)
description: The historic Bible of the Protestant Reformation and the Pilgrims.

title: Young's Literal Translation
description: An extremely strict, word-for-word translation prioritizing original Hebrew and Greek tenses.
